caption: A gathering of people is seen in an indoor setting featuring wood-paneled walls and vertical blinds. A man stands at a podium, wearing a white shirt and a dark vest, gesturing with his hand as he addresses a seated audience. To his right, another man in a blue shirt also stands behind a podium. The audience consists of several people viewed from behind; some wear traditional colorful textiles, such as a woman in a blue and red patterned wrap and another in a yellow garment. The text "ORCA" appears as a white watermark on the right side of the scene. Across the frames, the man at the primary podium continues to speak and move his hand, while the audience remains seated and attentive. The camera angle stays consistent, capturing the speakers from a medium distance as they interact with the assembled group.
